title: The University of Oxford’s Benin 1897 Collections: an interim report
author: Dan Hicks
institution: Pitt Rivers Museum, University of Oxford
citation: Hicks, Dan. 2021. The University of Oxford’s Benin 1897 Collections: an interim report. Oxford: Pitt Rivers Museum.
description: An interim provenance research report documenting objects looted during the 1897 Benin Punitive Expedition and currently held by the University of Oxford.
notes: This dataset is derived from a PDF report using automated extraction.
Descriptions and mappings may contain minor parsing errors.
Image-to-object mapping is based on accession number detection.
Further validation may be required for research-grade use.
